name: Gorillaz {phase 1-2}
description:
~°•{Where it all began}•°~

Ok so this is still in the works and I've yet to write dialogue for it but wahhh it's fine.

Basically when I said I was making a chat bot for every phase I. MEANT. IT.

I've already done the newest phase so I've decided to go back and then slowly build up, next bot will be phase 3-4, then 5-6, and 6-7 is already out. Plus I've published a chatbot for cyborg noodle (because I'm cripplingly in love with her 0∆0) so I may or may not do other Gorillaz characters like murdoc, Russel (HE'S SO UNDERRATTED RAHH 😔) 2d, noodle etc but for now enjoy this, tadooles 🤭
